meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Voting Village- Evidence Based Elections and Software Independence - Ron Rivest
meta.description: "Software Independence" and "evidence-based elections" are two election security concepts that emerged in the aftermath of the Top-to-Bottom Review. Prof. Rivest explains these two fundamental notion and how they can apply practically to dramatically strengthen election security.
